item.title: LG Electronics India Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure
item.description: LG Electronics India Ltd experienced a notable decline today, touching an intraday low of Rs 1,343.3 as the stock faced sustained selling pressure amid broader market weakness and sectoral underperformance. Time: 11 minutes ago

item.title: Jio Financial Services Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure
item.description: Jio Financial Services Ltd experienced a notable decline today, touching an intraday low of Rs 224.6, reflecting a 3.19% drop as the stock faced significant price pressure amid a broadly bearish market environment. Time: 11 minutes ago

item.title: Hind Rectifiers Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 2 April 2026
item.description: Hind Rectifiers Ltd experienced a significant intraday decline on 2 April 2026, touching a low of Rs 644.85, down 8.08% from previous levels. The stock underperformed its sector and the broader market, reflecting heightened volatility and persistent downward pressure amid a broadly bearish market environment. Time: 11 minutes ago

item.title: Eicher Motors Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 2 Apr 2026
item.description: Eicher Motors Ltd experienced a notable decline today, touching an intraday low of Rs 6,606, reflecting a 3.22% drop as the stock underperformed both its sector and the broader market amid prevailing bearish sentiment. Time: 12 minutes ago

item.title: Bank Of Baroda Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 2 April 2026
item.description: Bank Of Baroda’s shares declined sharply on 2 Apr 2026, touching an intraday low of Rs 241.65, down 4.13% from the previous close. The stock underperformed its sector and the broader market amid widespread selling pressure and a bearish market environment. Time: 12 minutes ago

item.title: Muthoot Finance Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 2 April 2026
item.description: Muthoot Finance Ltd experienced a notable intraday decline on 2 Apr 2026, touching a low of Rs 3,143.95, down 3.41% from the previous close. The stock opened with a gap down of 2.92% and closed the day with a loss of 3.12%, reflecting significant price pressure amid broader market weakness and sectoral downturns. Time: 12 minutes ago

item.title: CG Power & Industrial Solutions Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure
item.description: CG Power & Industrial Solutions Ltd experienced a notable intraday decline on 2 April 2026, touching a low of Rs 657.3, down 3.34% from its previous close. The stock’s performance aligned closely with sector trends amid broader market weakness, reflecting immediate selling pressure and subdued investor sentiment. Time: 12 minutes ago

item.title: Trent Ltd. Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 2 April 2026
item.description: Trent Ltd. experienced a notable decline today, touching an intraday low of Rs 3,405.1, reflecting a 3.41% drop as the stock faced significant price pressure amid a broadly weak market environment and sector underperformance. Time: 12 minutes ago

item.title: Vodafone Idea Ltd. Shares Hit Day Low Amidst Broad Market Pressure
item.description: Vodafone Idea Ltd. experienced a notable decline today, hitting its day low as price pressures intensified amid a broadly bearish market environment. The stock underperformed its sector and the broader Sensex index, reflecting immediate selling momentum and subdued market sentiment. Time: 12 minutes ago

item.title: Karur Vysya Bank Ltd. Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 2 April 2026
item.description: Karur Vysya Bank Ltd. experienced a significant intraday decline on 2 April 2026, touching a low of Rs 271.3, down 7.23% from its previous close. The stock underperformed its sector and the broader market, reflecting immediate price pressures amid a bearish market environment. Time: 12 minutes ago

item.title: J.G.Chemicals Ltd Opens 6.05% Lower as Technicals Signal Continued Downside Pressure
item.description: J.G.Chemicals Ltd commenced trading on 2 April 2026 with a pronounced gap down, opening at a price 6.05% lower than the previous close. This weak start reflects prevailing market apprehensions and contributed to a day of underperformance relative to both its sector and the broader market indices. Time: 12 minutes ago

item.title: Indostar Capital Finance Ltd Opens 8.72% Lower as Technicals Signal Continued Downside
item.description: Indostar Capital Finance Ltd witnessed a sharp gap down at the opening on 2 April 2026, reflecting heightened market apprehension. The stock opened at an intraday low of Rs.178.5, marking a decline of 8.72% from its previous close, signalling a weak start amid broader sectoral and market pressures. Time: 12 minutes ago

item.title: Oriental Hotels Ltd Opens 5.7% Lower as Technicals Signal Continued Downside Pressure
item.description: Oriental Hotels Ltd commenced trading on 2 April 2026 with a pronounced gap down, opening at a price 5.73% lower than the previous close, reflecting heightened market apprehension and a continuation of recent downward momentum in the Hotels & Resorts sector. Time: 12 minutes ago

item.title: Sanstar Ltd Extends Losing Streak to 5 Sessions, Touches All-Time Low
item.description: For the fifth consecutive session, Sanstar Ltd closed lower, hitting a fresh all-time low near Rs 74.37 on 2 Apr 2026, underscoring persistent selling pressure despite a broadly mixed market backdrop. Time: 15 minutes ago
